ddls:
CREATE TABLE "concept" (
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concept */,
  "concept_name" TEXT /* Name of the concept (e.g., Diagnosis, Procedure) */,
  "domain_id" TEXT /* Domain to which the concept belongs (e.g., Condition, Drug) */,
  "vocabulary_id" TEXT /* Vocabulary identifier from which the concept is derived */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the concept record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the concept record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vocabulary" (
  "vocabulary_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each vocabulary */,
  "vocabulary_name" TEXT /* Name of the vocabulary */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vocabulary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vocabulary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "patient_status" TEXT /* Status of the patient (e.g., active, inactive, deceased) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the provider */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the provider */,
  "provider_npi" TEXT /* National Provider Identifier (NPI) for the provider */,
  "provider_specialty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider's specialty */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_providers_provider_specialty_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_specialty_id") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specialties" (
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialty */,
  "specialty_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key that refers to the patient associated with the visit */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key that refers to the provider associated with the visit */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., outpatient, inpatient) */,
  "visit_status" TEXT /* Status of the visit (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visit record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "condition_occurrence" (
  "condition_occurrence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition occurrence event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key that refers to the patient associated with the condition occurrence */,
  "condition_concept_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key that refers to a standard condition concept identifier in the Vocabulary */,
  "condition_source_concept_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to a condition concept that refers to the code used in the source */,
  "condition_start_date" TEXT /* The date when the condition started */,
  "condition_end_date" TEXT /* The date when the condition is considered to have ended (if known) */,
  "condition_end_datetime" TEXT /* The date and time when the condition is considered to have ended */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key that refers to the visit associated with the condition occurrence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition occurrence record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition occurrence record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_occurrence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_condition_occurrence_condition_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_concept_id") REFERENCES concept ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_condition_occurrence_condition_source_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_source_concept_id") REFERENCES concept ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_condition_occurrence_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_condition_occurrence_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key that refers to the visit associated with the diagnosis */,
  "condition_occurrence_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key that refers to the condition occurrence being diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis_type" TEXT /* Type of diagnosis (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "diagnosis_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the diagnosis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnosis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnosis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_condition_occurrence_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_occurrence_id") REFERENCES condition_occurrence ("condition_occurrence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key that refers to the patient receiving the medication */,
  "prescriber_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key that refers to the prescriber of the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication prescribed */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "medication_route" TEXT /* Route of administration for the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medication record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_prescriber_id FOREIGN KEY ("prescriber_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key that refers to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key that refers to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key that refers to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
